Off Calendar Sep-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Guadalupe Gamino, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8. (Administrative fee) and for failure to appear at the Early Settlement Conference is scheduled today. Court ordered OSC off calendar and dissolved. Due to a calendaring error, matter not appeared in the court's original calendar. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Jo Ann Bryce, CSR #3321. (212)
